Joe Root Anchors England to ODI Series Level in Sri Lanka

Jan 25, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Joe Root Anchors England to ODI Series Level in Sri Lanka

Joe Root produced a batting masterclass to guide England to a hard-fought five-wicket victory over Sri Lanka, leveling the three-match ODI series in Colombo.

Chasing a modest 220 on a slow, turning track, England faced a challenging target, but Root’s composed 75 anchored the innings. His performance showcased precise strike rotation, sweep shots, and clever use of the reverse sweep to neutralize the spin threats, helping England cross the line with 22 deliveries to spare.

👉 Joe Root Anchors England to ODI Series Level in Sri Lanka
